owned_state: context slots and context lookup replies for that shard id
proof_source: point16 per-shard context readback plus shard-aware MCPL key
failure_if: context slot writes or replies are observed from a non-owner shard/core

owned_state: route slots and route lookup replies for that shard id
proof_source: point16 per-shard route readback plus shard-aware MCPL key
failure_if: route lookup replies cross shard or duplicate for one pending lookup

owned_state: memory slots and memory lookup replies for that shard id
proof_source: point16 per-shard memory readback plus shard-aware MCPL key
failure_if: memory lookup replies cross shard or duplicate for one pending lookup

owned_state: pending horizons, reward maturation, readout update, lookup request accounting
proof_source: point16 learning pending/reply parity and final readout state
failure_if: pending horizon mutates outside the owning learning core

owned_state: two static polyp/lifecycle slots per reef partition
proof_source: 4.30 static lifecycle pool size plus 4.32a-hw-replicated shard ids
failure_if: one polyp slot appears in more than one partition or no partition

owned_state: birth/death/trophic mutation until a combined lifecycle partition is measured
failure_if: 4.32b is described as autonomous lifecycle-to-learning MCPL
